details.test: Task 1: Book 60-min beginner guitar lesson online under $70
Task 2: Purchase most affordable 4+ lesson online piano package for intermediate adults under $220
Task 3: Request quote for jazz trio wedding performance on Aug 15, 2026 within $800
Task 4: Schedule 8 weekly recurring online pop voice lessons on Tuesdays at 7 pm
Task 5: Start practice resources subscription under $25/month for guitar & piano with >=7-day trial
Task 6: Favorite one violin and one additional instructor with beginner level, weekend/evening availability, 4.5+ ratings
Task 7: Enroll one child in kids ukulele group class next month on Saturdays for $25 or less per class
Task 8: Order a $150 printable birthday gift card for music lessons
Task 9: Save three recent beginner piano practice tip articles to reading list
